text.text: Shadow Silver Ore was once a rare variant of Silver Ore, appearing in place of ordinary silver throughout the Overworld. It was no mere silver, but silver touched by a hidden power: moon-dim in luster, and ever eager to bury itself from sight. Yet as silver vanished from the Overworld, Shadow Silver vanished with it, lost before most Tinkers ever learned where to seek it.
It generates between Y=-64 and Y=64.
